part.text:
# View Change Evolution with jj obslog

## Background
In Jujutsu (`jj`), a change can evolve over time as it is amended, rebased, or otherwise updated. The `jj obslog` (or `jj evolog`) command shows the history of how a specific change has evolved, listing the previous commits that the change pointed to.

## Requirements
- Navigate to the repository at `/home/user/repo`.
- Run the `jj obslog` (or `jj evolog`) command on the current working copy commit.
- Save the full output of the command to `/home/user/obslog.txt`.

## Constraints
- Project path: `/home/user/repo`
- Output file: `/home/user/obslog.txt`

<system-reminder># System Information

Operating System: linux
Default Shell: 
Home Directory: /root
Current Working Directory: /
Current Time: Wed Apr 15 2026 16:13:36 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

# GIT STATUS

Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:


# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

## Background
In Jujutsu (`jj`), a change can evolve over time as it is amended, rebased, or otherwise updated. The `jj obslog` (or `jj evolog`) command shows the history of how a specific change has evolved, listing the previous commits that the change pointed to.

@  qxswmxry test@example.com 2026-04-14 17:32:07 fe01b767
│  v2
│  -- operation 31d2f33fae90 describe commit 3f98f79d8edefc8f407a03950479ea58897f49b8
○  qxswmxry/1 test@example.com 2026-04-14 17:32:07 3f98f79d (hidden)
│  v1
│  -- operation 293f3fd5040c snapshot working copy
○  qxswmxry/2 test@example.com 2026-04-14 17:32:07 bcbc2abd (hidden)
│  v1
│  -- operation b4698a4f494f describe commit bf0c1602164a12ed876491c9664417eeb80528f2
○  qxswmxry/3 test@example.com 2026-04-14 17:32:07 bf0c1602 (hidden)
│  (no description set)
│  -- operation 2fd9cc364c1a snapshot working copy
○  qxswmxry/4 test@example.com 2026-04-14 17:32:07 44cfa021 (hidden)
   (empty) (no description set)
   -- operation ae752ed87510 add workspace 'default'
